_comment: REPRESENTATIVE captured-geometry fixture (NOT a synthetic single-scale formula). Models a standard 1080p primary monitor at 100% scale with a decorated main window. Values resemble a real capture: outer_position()/inner_position() in physical px, getBoundingClientRect() in CSS px. Expected rect computed as client-origin (physical) + anchor-offset*scale.
description: single monitor, 100% scale, decorated main window
